arts.ttl: Brighton enquire about Lyon’s Corentin Tolisso
arts.sum: Brighton and Hove Albion have enquired about a move for Olympique Lyonnais midfielder Corentin Tolisso (30), according to a report from L’Équipe. Lyon are prohibited from recruiting in January and in…

arts.ttl: Jack Grealish told to return to Aston Villa as pundit touts move amid Manchester City struggle
arts.sum: "It’s at the stage now where Jack should probably be thinking about leaving the football club," Hendrie, who played 303 times in claret and blue, said to 10bet . Former Villa player Lee Hendrie, who knows Grealish well, has urged the England international to leave City in favour of a return to Villa Park .

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Brighton TV channel, live stream and kick off time
arts.sum: Aston Villa are looking to immediately bounce back after their 3-0 festive defeat to Newcastle United when they host Brighton and Hove Albion on Monday night. The match between Villa and Brighton is set to commence at 7:45pm on Monday, December 30.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa ‘exploring terms’ over exciting £25million winger transfer

Malen, who has five goals and one assist to his name so far this term, came through at Ajax before joining Arsenal as a 16-year-old in 2015 but a couple of years later he was sold to PSV.

arts.ttl: Brighton interest in player ‘not at all surprising’ – Clubs have done successful business before
arts.sum: Brighton and Hove Albion’s interest in Union SG forward Franjo Ivanovic is no surprise, given the close relationship between the two sides. That’s according to Voetbal Nieuws, who say the past dealings between the two clubs makes Brighton’s interest in the 21-year-old almost a given. arts.ttl: Aston Villa join Arsenal, Chelsea and Liverpool in transfer race for Egyptian goal machine
arts.sum: Aston Villa have reportedly entered the race to sign Eintracht Frankfurt's red hot forward Omar Marmoush after his outstanding first half of the season. Durán has been a revelation for Villa this season, scoring seven Premier League goals despite only starting four league games, but is currently serving a three-match ban after receiving a controversial red card in his side's 3-0 Boxing Day defeat against Newcastle.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United coach learns fate after red card in Aston Villa melee

arts.ttl: Man City are in danger of losing ANOTHER young star after Cole Palmer and Morgan Rogers - as Bayer Leverkusen lead the chase with midfielder's contract running out
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen are emerging as contenders to sign Manchester City midfielder James McAtee. The 22-year old came off the bench to play a decisive cameo in City's victory over Leicester City.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Brighton – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Aston Villa take on Brighton in the Premier League this evening hoping to find some consistency. Unai Emery’s side lost 3-0 at Newcastle United on Boxing Day and have suffered three losses in their last six – each to top-four rivals.
